description: Intent-only request: classify incident investigation as an agent because each action depends on observed results.

text: Build an incident investigator that watches for critical production alerts, checks logs and metrics, decides which service or deployment is most likely responsible, gathers more evidence as needed, and then either recommends a rollback, opens an incident, or escalates to the on-call engineer.

processExpectations: The agent classifies the incident investigator request as a full agent.
The agent explains that each next action depends on interpreting logs, metrics, or prior investigation results.
The agent identifies the need for an autonomous tool-use loop.
The agent does not classify the request as a deterministic workflow because the control flow cannot be fully enumerated before runtime.

executionScenarios.name: intent-only-response
executionScenarios.description: The agent should only classify intent; no executable workflow is expected
executionScenarios.dataSetup: No external data is required because this scenario is an intent-classification prompt.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The response classifies the request as a full agent and explains that investigation steps depend on runtime observations.
